title: Systems Design Review — 2024-07-24

# Systems Design Review — 2024-07-24

**Attendees:** Jordan Kim, Dev Patel, Tobias Wren, Sam Dreher

## Summary

This page covers the thermal management approach for the Systems subsystem. Key items discussed and actions agreed are recorded here.
